scripts.dev: npx kill-port 3000 3001 ; npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:all: npm run kill-ports && npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:scheduler & npm run dev:backoffice
scripts.heroku-postbuild: if [ "$HEROKU_APP_NAME" = "echatbot-scheduler" ]; then npm run heroku:scheduler; elif [ "$HEROKU_APP_NAME" = "echatbot-backoffice" ]; then npm run heroku:backoffice; else npm run heroku:app; fi
scripts.heroku:app: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @echatbot/database && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && echo '✅ echatbot-app: Database + Backend + Frontend built'
scripts.heroku:scheduler: cp Procfile.scheduler Procfile && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:scheduler && echo '✅ echatbot-scheduler: Scheduler built'
scripts.heroku:backoffice: cp Procfile.backoffice Procfile && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:backoffice && npm install -g serve && echo '✅ echatbot-backoffice: Backoffice built'
scripts.prod:all: npm run prod:backend && npm run prod:scheduler
scripts.test: run-s test:be test:fe test:scheduler test:backoffice test:db
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist
